b_class_findings.finding: R8 specifies the discovery ## Kept user pauses inventory uses H2, but the lifecycle parity test the discovery test is supposed to mirror hardcodes H3 in its section-parsing regex. The spec does not flag that the inventory-parser scaffolding must diverge from the lifecycle test regex, contradicting the mirrors exactly framing.
b_class_findings.evidence_quote: Discovery inventory anchor is ## Kept user pauses heading (H2, matching the lifecycle file H3 modulo level — picked H2 because discovery SKILL.md has fewer existing H2 sections).
